top_signals.title: LNG Supply Crisis Pushes Buyers Toward Coal and Oil
top_signals.summary: The resumption of the Iran conflict, including the effective closures of the Strait of Hormuz and now the Strait of Bab el-Mandeb has driven up natural gas prices, particularly in Europe and Asia. Asia accounts for nearly 90% of liquefied natural gas (LNG) shipments from key Middle East producers like Qatar and the UAE, while Europe imports 7-11% of its LNG imports from the region. European gas prices surged to four-month highs amid fears the US-Iran war will cause winter shortages. As The Guardian wrote, The Dutch natural gas benchmark briefly…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China grabs ADNOC LNG orders as challenge to Korea’s shipbuilders grows
top_signals.summary: China is quickly closing in on Korea in the liquefied natural gas (LNG) carrier market. After taking over the general commercial ship market such as oil tankers, it is also growing its presence in high-difficulty advanced vessels. LNG carriers are a representative high value-added ship type where Korea still holds an edge, even as China ...

top_signals.title: Strait of Hormuz: The unrelenting crisis in the Persian Gulf continues
top_signals.summary: The front-month ICE Brent contract continues to trade near the $90/bbl mark as ongoing tensions in the Middle East show no signs of de-escalation. Merchant vessels continue to come under attack while attempting to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, the United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) reported. top_signals.title: Fairfield Maritime Japan and Neste Sign Long-Term Charter Contract for Two Ice Class 1A MR Tankers
top_signals.summary: Fairfield Maritime Japan Ltd. (FMJ) has signed a long-term charter contract with Neste. The agreement enables FMJ to fund and manage the construction of two Ice Class 1A medium range (MR) oil and chemical tankers for Neste’s transports to and from its refinery in Porvoo, Finland. Neste is the world’s leading producer of renewable diesel ...

alerts.title: Lloyd’s Register verifies International marine coatings vessel performance analysis under ISO 19030
alerts.summary: International®, AkzoNobel’s marine coatings brand, today announced that Lloyd’s Register (LR) has verified its vessel performance analysis methodology as compliant with ISO 19030, the global standard for measuring changes in hull and propeller performance. The independent validation strengthens confidence in how vessel speed loss is measured and reported, providing shipowners, charterers, and vessel performance analysts ...
